questionText: Do you calculate greenhouse gas emissions for each agricultural commodity reported as significant to your business?
questionKo: 귀사 산정 온실가스 배출량 각 농업 원자재 보고된 귀사의 사업?
sectorTags: Agricultural commodities, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry
simpleHelp: Agricultural commodities that are significant to your business in terms of revenue could be closely associated with large CO2 emissions and signal dependency on natural capital and its associated ecosystem services under threat by climate change. This question enables data users to gauge how prepared your organization is to respond to risks related to your reliance on agricultural commodities by assessing whether you collect and/or calculate greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions data on these commodities. This information also provides further context to data users about the magnitude of the climate-related risks associated with your business where these commodities are not produced/sourced sustainably or managed carefully.

columns.text: GHG emissions calculated for this commodity
options: No, but we intend to calculate this data within the next two years
No, and we do not intend to calculate this data within the next two years
columns.textKo: GHG 배출량 계산된 에 대한 이 원자재
optionsKo: , 그러나 당사 이 데이터 내 향후 2개 연도
, 및 당사 아님 이 데이터 내 향후 2개 연도

options: This is our first year of measurement

columns.text: Explain why you do not calculate GHG emissions for this commodity
columns.textKo: 설명 왜 귀사 아님 GHG 배출량 에 대한 이 원자재

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select "Yes" in response to the column "Is this commodity considered significant to your business in terms of revenue?" for any row of 1.22 or 1.23.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Organizations are encouraged to calculate GHG emissions data for 
all  agricultural commodities specified as significant to their business in terms of revenue.
Agricultural commodities (column 0) 
Note that only those agricultural commodities that you indicated are significant in terms of revenue in 1.22 or 1.23 will appear in the list.
Reporting emissions by (column 2) 
This column is only presented if you select "Yes" in column 1 "GHG emissions calculated for this commodity".
Organizations are encouraged to report the agricultural commodity associated emissions per unit of production, e.g. CO2e/kg of product. However, if you are unable to provide this, you may report your emissions as an absolute figure by selecting "Total".
Emissions (metric tons CO2e) (column 3) 
This column is only presented if you select "Yes" in column 1 "GHG emissions calculated for this commodity".
This figure should be representative of your reporting year, boundaries for data collection/calculation as indicated in column 3 "Reporting emissions by" and expressed in metric tons.
Denominator: unit of production (column 4) 
This column will appear only if you select "Unit of production" in column 2 "Reporting emissions by".
Change from last reporting year (column 5) 
This column is only presented if you select "Yes" in column 1 "GHG emissions calculated for this commodity".
Please explain (column 6) 
This column is only presented if you select "Yes" in column 1 "GHG emissions calculated for this commodity".
If you used the "Other commodity" row to report a different commodity in 1.23, specify the name of the commodity produced or sourced by your organization.
Specify the boundaries used for data calculation, e.g. organization-wide, direct operations, upstream value chain or only selected facilities.
Specify any exclusions in the case your reported figure does not cover your entire boundary for data collection/calculation. In this, provide an explanation as to why you have excluded certain parts of your organization.
Provide details on the methods/tools and assumptions used to calculate your figure reported in column 4 "Emissions (metric tons CO2e)".
Explain why you do not calculate GHG emission for this commodity (column 7) 
This column is only presented if you select either "No" option in column 1 "GHG emissions calculated for this commodity".
If you used the "Other commodity" row to report a different commodity in 1.23, specify the name of the commodity produced or sourced by your organization.
If you selected "No, but we intend to calculate this data within the next two years", detail your plans, by including:
Coverage of data calculation, e.g. organization-wide, upstream/downstream value chain or only selected facilities;
Timeframe for starting to calculate this information;
Methods/tools you plan to use.
If you selected "No, and we do not intend to calculate this data within the next two years", specify your main reason for not collecting/calculating this data and provide an explanation.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
The following tools can be used for calculating commodity-specific agricultural emissions: 
RSPO PalmGHG Calculator 
GHG Protocol Pulp and Paper tool 
Cool Farm tool 
FAO EX-ACT tool 
For an overview of the available resources (i.e. standards, methodologies, tools, and calculators) for assessing emissions from agricultural production and agriculturally-driven land use change, please refer to:  Measure the Chain: Tools for Assessing GHG Emissions in Agricultural Supply Chains
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 응답 작성 시 참고할 수 있는 추가 설명입니다. 필요한 경우 관련 기준, 방법론, 내부 검토 자료를 근거로 활용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed. Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 8/8 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Points will be awarded per completed row (excluding column 'Denominator: unit of production') in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
'Yes' selected in column 'Do you collect or calculate GHG emissions for this commodity?' AND
Figure greater than 0 provided in column 'Emissions (metric tons CO2e)' AND
Any option excluding either 'Higher' OR 'Much higher' selected in column 'Change from last reporting year'.
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Points will be awarded per completed row in proportion to the number of rows disclosed as follows:
'No, not currently but intend to collect or calculate...' selected in column 'Do you collect or calculate GHG emissions for this commodity?'
A maximum of 3/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 이 평가기준은 해당 점수 수준에서 요구되는 조건입니다. 배점표, 문항 응답 구조, 완료 셀, 선택지 및 설명 입력 여부를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Table completed - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 표 완료 - 1 점 이 문항에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
'Yes' selected in column 'GHG emissions calculated for this commodity' in all rows - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: '예'열에서 선택'GHG 배출량 산정d 이 원자재' 모든 행 - 1 점 이 문항에서 최대 1/1점을 받을 수 있습니다.

change.q2025_text: Do you calculate greenhouse gas emissions for each agricultural commodity reported as significant to your business?
change.change_summary: Rows "Rubber" and "Wild capture seafood" added and row "Fish and seafood from aquaculture" renamed to "Farmed seafood / Aquaculture".
change.daml_summary:
Agricultural commodities: D 8/8 | A 3/3 | M 1/1 | L 1/1
Food, beverage & tobacco: D 8/8 | A 3/3 | M 1/1 | L 1/1
Paper & forestry: D 8/8 | A 3/3 | M 1/1 | L 1/1

sourceInfo.nameKo: CDP 2026 전체 기업 문항 및 보고 가이던스

sourceInfo.name: CDP Climate Change Scoring Essential Criteria 2026

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사 산정 온실가스 배출량 각 농업 원자재 보고된 귀사의 사업?'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
listTitleEn: Do you calculate greenhouse gas emissions for each agricultural commodity reported as significant to your business?
